scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: echo "Chạy 2 terminal: pnpm dev:api và pnpm dev:web (Postgres.app phải Running)"
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/amazing-studio run build
scripts.build:ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
